mapper.select: select count(1) from article_favorites where article_id = #{articleId}
select count(1) from comments where article_id = #{articleId}

select A.id, A.slug, A.title, A.description, count(AF.user_id) as favoriteCount from articles A inner join article_favorites AF on A.id = AF.article_id where AF.created_at >= datetime('now', '-' || #{daysAgo} || ' days') group by A.id, A.slug, A.title, A.description order by favoriteCount desc limit #{limit}
